China issues guidelines on financial services data amid broader cybersecurity push
China 'strongly dissatisfied' with Pentagon move against top Chinese tech firms

holdings.infoBox: FXI is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are China Construction Bank stock at 8.57%, Tencent Holdings at 7.69%, Alibaba Group Holding at 7.55%, Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 6.29%, and Xiaomi at 4.98%.

overview.description: The iShares China Large-Cap ETF (FXI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE China 50 Net Tax USD index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 50 largest Chinese stocks traded on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. FXI was launched on Oct 5, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
data.text: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar before first decision by a FOMC led by Chairman Kevin Warsh later.
